provenance.title: Nemotron-Personas-Korea public core sample
provenance.samplingMethod: deterministic evenly-spaced offsets (20 x 16) via Hugging Face datasets-server

usageBoundary.purpose: Synthetic cohort safety-plan QA; not attendance, behavior, medical, or incident prediction.
usageBoundary.browserPolicy: Only normalized demographic fields are shipped. Synthetic names, UUIDs, and narrative personas are excluded.
usageBoundary.legalBoundary: Persona results must not change statutory applicability decisions.

limitations: The source contains synthetic adults aged 19 and older; it does not cover children.
The public core variant does not provide validated disability, mobility, language-proficiency, or event-attendance labels.
A 320-row deterministic sample is for product QA, not official population estimation.
Rare but safety-critical needs must be tested with explicit sentinel scenarios regardless of sample prevalence.
